options.title: Luxury Wedding Film
options.emotionalArc: quiet awe that swells to a graceful, glowing finale
options.summary: A minimal, cinematic edit that lets the strongest images breathe with sparse, tasteful text.
options.fitReason: suits sets with several strong hero-worthy frames.

options.title: A Day To Remember
options.emotionalArc: gentle beginning, rising warmth, tearful-happy peak, soft landing
options.summary: Tells the day in order, leaning into candid, emotional moments and family warmth.
options.fitReason: works when the set spans getting-ready through celebration.

options.title: Korean Romance
options.emotionalArc: airy and tender throughout, blooming at the couple moments
options.summary: A light, romantic mood board of close, tender couple frames with a delicate feel.

options.title: Family & Friends
options.emotionalArc: playful energy building to a big, joyful group finale
options.summary: Centres the people around the couple — laughter, groups and celebration.
options.fitReason: shines when there are many group and candid photos.
